summary: Completed testing of Iteration 12 features: Password visibility toggle, HR Policies/Claims dashboards, Admin Claims management. All 15 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/claims returns claims list - PASS
Backend: POST /api/claims creates claim (admin only) - PASS
Backend: POST /api/claims returns 403 for HR users - PASS
Backend: GET /api/claims/{id} returns single claim - PASS
Backend: PUT /api/claims/{id} updates claim (admin only) - PASS
Backend: PUT /api/claims/{id} returns 403 for HR users - PASS
Backend: DELETE /api/claims/{id} deletes claim (admin only) - PASS
Backend: DELETE /api/claims/{id} returns 403 for HR users - PASS
Backend: GET /api/claims-analytics returns analytics data - PASS
Backend: GET /api/claims-analytics accessible by HR users - PASS
Backend: GET /api/claims-analytics with policy_type filter - PASS
Backend: GET /api/policies-analytics returns analytics data - PASS
Backend: GET /api/policies-analytics accessible by HR users - PASS
Backend: GET /api/claims with status filter - PASS
Backend: GET /api/claims with policy_type filter - PASS
Frontend: Login password visibility toggle (Eye/EyeOff) - PASS
Frontend: Registration password visibility toggle - PASS
Frontend: HR Dashboard shows Policies tab in navigation - PASS
Frontend: HR Dashboard shows Claims tab in navigation - PASS
Frontend: HR Policies Dashboard loads with charts and table - PASS
Frontend: HR Claims Dashboard loads with charts, filters, and table - PASS
Frontend: Admin Dashboard shows Claims tab in navigation - PASS

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration12_features.py - Created test suite for Iteration 12 features
seed_data_creation: 3 sample claims exist in database for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 features fully tested and working. 1) Password visibility toggle works on both login and registration forms using Eye/EyeOff icons from lucide-react. 2) HR Dashboard has 7 nav items: Dashboard, Policies, Claims, Submit Endorsement, My Endorsements, Import Excel, Cloud Storage. 3) HR Policies Dashboard (/hr/policies) shows policy analytics with pie chart (status), bar chart (by type), summary cards, and policies table. 4) HR Claims Dashboard (/hr/claims) shows claims analytics with 3 charts (status pie, type pie, monthly trend), policy type filter, summary cards, and claims table. 5) Admin Dashboard has 11 nav items including Claims. 6) Admin Claims Management (/admin/claims) allows full CRUD operations - Add Claim button opens dialog with all fields, table shows claims with edit/delete buttons. 7) Backend APIs: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/claims (admin only for write ops), GET /api/claims-analytics, GET /api/policies-analytics.

password_visibility_toggle.details: Eye/EyeOff icons toggle password field type between 'password' and 'text' on both login and registration forms

hr_policies_dashboard.details: Shows 5 summary cards (Total, Active, Expired, Lives Covered, Annual Premium), 2 charts (Status Pie, Type Bar), and policies table

hr_claims_dashboard.details: Shows 5 summary cards, 3 charts (Status, Type, Monthly Trend), policy type filter dropdown, and claims table

admin_claims_management.details: Full CRUD: Add Claim button opens dialog with all fields, table shows claims with edit/delete buttons per row

claims_api_endpoints.details: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/claims work correctly with proper admin-only restrictions for write operations

analytics_api_endpoints.details: GET /api/claims-analytics and GET /api/policies-analytics return proper analytics data with filtering support
